title: Add LICENSE file
body: MIT License added. Original GridLook authors credited.

title: Add CITATION.cff
body: Citation metadata for the software, following CFF format.

title: Generate codemeta.json with SOMEF
body: Run the generate-codemeta workflow to auto-generate codemeta.json from the repository metadata.

title: Run RSFC FAIR assessment
body: Run the fair_assessment workflow to evaluate software FAIRness and generate RSFC_REPORT.md.

title: Update package.json metadata
body: Add description, license, homepage, and repository fields to package.json.

title: Update README.md
body: Document features, usage, URL format, and acknowledge GridLook origins.
